ksa_text: Knowledge of master data management (MDM) principles and architecture, including golden record construction, data domain definition, MDM hub models (registry, consolidation, coexistence, centralized), and stewardship workflows.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-008 (Data Quality/Knowledge) excluded as edge_case (composite 0.387, highest: O*NET at 0.387). Domain prior: edge. Core hits: 1. OOS hits: 0. pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with edge_case classification, composite 0.387, and Data Quality (DQ) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Data Quality KSA (composite 0.387)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Data Marketplace Manager job postings does not surface this Data Quality competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
